delta.text: I
'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm we're on the home screen.

content.text: I'll start by pressing home and taking a screenshot to confirm we're on the home screen.
请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

name.

delta.text: It
seems the Google Contacts app didn't open (still on home screen). Let me try the system
contacts app instead, which is likely the phone's built-in contacts on this Xia
omi device.

delta.text: I'm in
the Contacts app. It shows "没有找到联系人" (No contacts found). I
can see the green "+" button to add a new contact. Let me tap it.

content.text: I'm in the Contacts app. It shows "没有找到联系人" (No contacts found). I can see the green "+" button to add a new contact. Let me tap it.

delta.text: I'm on
the "新建小米账号联系人" (New Xia
omi account contact) form. I can see fields for 姓名 (Name), 公司 (Company), 职位 (Position), and 电话 (Phone). The
name field is currently focused. Let me use the XML to get
the innerid for the name field and input the name.
